context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the exit-intent detection module using the prescribed mouse tracking logic, mobile fallback, delay pattern, and cleanup function structure.

checklist.name: mousemove threshold check
checklist.description: Checks e.clientY against a threshold (default 20) — the condition is e.clientY < threshold

checklist.name: movementY direction check
checklist.description: Also checks e.movementY < 0 on the mousemove handler (upward movement toward top of viewport)

checklist.name: mouseleave clientY check
checklist.description: Registers a mouseleave listener that fires when e.clientY <= 0 (cursor left through top of viewport)

checklist.name: Activation delay
checklist.description: Both the mouseleave and mousemove listeners are registered inside a setTimeout with a delay (default 3000ms), not immediately

checklist.name: Default delay value
checklist.description: The default delay value is 3000 (milliseconds) when not specified by the caller

checklist.name: Default threshold value
checklist.description: The default threshold value is 20 (pixels) when not specified by the caller

checklist.name: Mobile visibilitychange
checklist.description: Registers a visibilitychange listener that triggers when document.visibilityState === 'hidden' for mobile support

checklist.name: Single activation guard
checklist.description: Uses an 'activated' boolean flag to ensure onExitIntent is called at most once

checklist.name: Cleanup function returned
checklist.description: The init function returns a cleanup function that calls clearTimeout and removes the mousemove event listener

checklist.name: TypeScript interface exported
checklist.description: Exports a TypeScript interface or type for the configuration options (threshold, delay, onExitIntent)
